name: L.P.N. Development Public Company Limited
summary: L.P.N. Development Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, develops real estate properties in Thailand. It is involved in the development of residential and non-residential condominiums. The company also provides community management services for office and residential condominiums; building engineering services; condominium unit and office space brokerage services; construction management services; and real estate products and services research, development, and consultancy services. In addition, it leases office buildings; and offers security services. L.P.N. Development Public Company Limited was founded in 1989 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
